question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between Utah Jazz and Denver Nuggets on 2026-03-27?
question.context: Utah Jazz (21-52) at Denver Nuggets (46-28). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: Denver Nuggets are a strong offensive team averaging around 115-118 points per game. Utah Jazz are a rebuilding team with a poor record (21-52), averaging around 108-112 points per game. Denver plays at a moderate pace and scores efficiently at home. Utah tends to give up points on defense. Expected scores roughly: Denver ~118, Utah ~110, totaling around 228. NBA games typically fall in the 210-245 range, with the distribution centered around league average of ~225-230. Denver's home court advantage and Utah's weak defense push the total slightly above average.
